- <a href="blog/the-cost-of-building-cloud-agents.html"
  class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">April 20, 2026
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### The Cost of Building Cloud Agents

  What enterprises underestimate about building cloud agents.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="blog/devin-in-windsurf.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">April 15, 2026
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Devin in Windsurf

  Local agents make you faster. Cloud agents do the work while you're
  not there.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="blog/swe-check-10x-faster.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">April 14, 2026
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">Raymond Feng¹, Jeffrey
  Ling², Rhythm Garg¹, Moritz Stephan² (¹ Applied Compute, ² Cognition
  AI)</span> </span></span> </span>
  <span class="o-blog-preview__description"> </span>
  ### Introducing SWE-Check: 10x Faster Bug Detection

  Smaller specialized models can match or beat frontier generalists on
  the tasks they're trained for. Working with Applied Compute, we
  RL-trained SWE-check, a bug detection model that matches Opus 4.6 on
  our internal evals while running ~10x faster.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="blog/new-self-serve-plans-for-devin.html"
  class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">April 14, 2026
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### New self-serve plans for Devin

  We’re retiring the old Core and Team plans and introducing a new
  lineup: Free, Pro, Max, Teams, and Enterprise. We’re also beginning to
  charge for products that have been free until now, including Ask Devin
  and Devin Review.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="blog/launching-in-japan.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">April 9, 2026
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Launching in Japan with Takumi Masai

  Today we're launching Cognition Japan, our first expansion into Asia,
  to partner with Japanese enterprises ready to transform how software
  gets built.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a
  href="blog/how-devin-is-modernizing-cobol-at-fortune-500-companies.html"
  class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">April 8, 2026
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### How Devin Is Modernizing COBOL at Fortune 500 Companies

  We wrote up why COBOL is so hard for agents, what it takes to get it
  right, and where Devin is delivering today.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="blog/swe-1-6.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">April 7, 2026
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">Rohan Choudhury, Carlo
  Baronio, Ben Pan, Sam Lee, Eric Lu, Steven Cao, Joe Li, Andrew Wang,
  Adam Zweiger, Ray Wang, Gary Chang, Silas Alberti</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Introducing SWE 1.6: Improving Model UX

  We're releasing SWE-1.6, our latest model optimized for both
  intelligence and model UX.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="blog/devin-can-now-schedule-devins.html"
  class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">March 20, 2026
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Devin can now Schedule Devins

  Devin can now schedule its own recurring sessions. Run a task once,
  and if it goes well, tell Devin to keep doing it. It maintains state
  between runs, so each session picks up where the last one left off.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="blog/devin-can-now-manage-devins.html"
  class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">March 19, 2026
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Devin can now Manage Devins

  Devin can now break down large tasks and delegate them to a team of
  managed Devins, with each running in its own isolated VM in parallel.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="blog/swe-1-6-preview.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">March 1, 2026
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">Carlo Baronio, Ben Pan, Sam
  Lee, Eric Lu, Steven Cao, Rohan Choudhury, Adam Zweiger, Ray Wang,
  Gary Chang, Silas Alberti</span> </span></span> </span>
  <span class="o-blog-preview__description"> </span>
  ### An Early Preview of SWE-1.6 and Research Update

  We are sharing an early preview of our ongoing SWE-1.6 training run.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="blog/how-cognition-uses-devin-to-build-devin.html"
  class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">February 27, 2026
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### How Cognition Uses Devin to Build Devin

  Devin is a cloud agent platform for engineering teams. You work with
  it like a teammate — give it tasks, review its PRs, and let it handle
  your backlog. Here's how we use it to build Devin itself.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="blog/cognition-for-government.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">February 25, 2026
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Introducing Cognition for Government

  Today, we launch Cognition for Government to modernize America’s
  critical infrastructure with AI software engineering.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="blog/introducing-devin-2-2.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">February 24, 2026
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Introducing Devin 2.2

  Today we’re releasing Devin 2.2, the most important update to Devin
  since launch.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a
  href="blog/closing-the-agent-loop-devin-autofixes-review-comments.html"
  class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">February 10, 2026
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Closing the Agent Loop: Devin Autofixes Review Comments

  We built a feature that massively increased our internal token spend
  on Devin. But our PRs are now much more free of bugs and we can't go
  back.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="blog/agent-trace.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">January 29, 2026
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Agent Trace: Capturing the Context Graph of Code

  We’re excited to join in Cursor, Cloudflare, Vercel, git-ai, OpenCode
  and others in support of \[Agent Trace\](https://agent-trace.dev/). As
  described in the spec, Agent Trace is an open, vendor-neutral spec for
  recording AI contributions alongside human authorship in
  version-controlled codebases.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="blog/cognizant-cognition.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">January 28, 2026
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Cognizant partners with Cognition to scale Devin and Windsurf across its engineering organization and global clients

  Cognizant has partnered with Cognition to deploy Devin and Windsurf
  across its engineering teams and customer base.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="blog/cognition-london.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">January 28, 2026
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Devin crosses the pond: Cognition opens its London office

  Cognition expands to Europe and opens a London office.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="blog/devin-review.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">January 21, 2026
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Devin Review: AI to Stop Slop

  As code generation gets easier, code review is the new bottleneck.
  That's why we're launching a new way to quickly review and understand
  complex PRs in our latest tool for codebase understanding - augmenting
  human attention with AI.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="blog/infosys-cognition.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">January 7, 2026
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Infosys partners with Cognition to expand engineering capacity and help scale its enterprise business

  Infosys, a global leader in digital services and consulting, has
  partnered with Cognition to deploy Devin, the AI software engineer,
  across its organization and global client base.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="blog/devin-annual-performance-review-2025.html"
  class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">November 14, 2025
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Devin's 2025 Performance Review: Learnings From 18 Months of Agents At Work

  Eighteen months since launch, Devin’s gone from tackling small
  projects, to deeply embedding in engineering teams at thousands of
  companies, including some of the largest businesses in the world. We
  decided it was well past time for Devin to get a performance review -
  just like any human engineer.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="blog/codemaps.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">November 4, 2025
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Windsurf Codemaps: Understand Code, Before You Vibe It

  Codemaps is meant to offer a shared understanding of a system between
  humans and AI, enabling your AI to teach you about the code you are
  looking at quickly and elegantly. A codemap can be generated about any
  system or snippet to illuminate its code paths, helping users learn
  and recall. Codemaps allows AI to be a partner that explains code in
  an accurate and consistent way, rather than generating tons of
  inscrutable slop.

  </div>

  </div>

</div>

more</span></a>

</div>
